title: wolfyy's armor hud
description:
a simple armor hud mod i made out of boredom lol          

displays current armors name durability and texture
body:
a simple minecraft armor hud showing durability, texture, and name of equipped armor pieces

not very optimized or anything, but works i guess

used some chat gpt to help with troubleshooting and general help :P

idk use it as you want, branch or something i dont really care :P
